summary: Multi-zone parcelas feature tested successfully. Backend API supports creating, reading, updating parcelas with multiple recintos (zones). Frontend UI shows Zonas column in table, map toolbar with drawing tools, zones info panel, and general map view.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing contratos and parcelas
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-zone parcelas feature is fully functional. Backend supports List[ParcelaRecinto] in models.py. Frontend AdvancedParcelMap.js handles multiple zones with AdvancedDrawControl. Parcelas.js uses zones state array instead of single polygon. Table shows Zonas column with zone count badges. Edit mode loads all recintos from parcela. General map view renders all recintos per parcela.

backend: POST /api/parcelas with multiple recintos array - WORKING
GET /api/parcelas returns parcelas with recintos array - WORKING
PUT /api/parcelas/{id} with new recintos updates zones - WORKING
frontend: Parcelas page loads with table showing parcelas - WORKING
Table has 'Zonas' column showing zone count - WORKING
'Nueva Parcela' button opens form with map - WORKING
Map toolbar shows drawing tools (polygon, rectangle, circle) - WORKING
Map has satellite view by default - WORKING
Zones info panel shows zone count and 'Limpiar todo' button - WORKING
Edit parcela loads zones from recintos - WORKING
'Ver Mapa' general map shows all parcelas with legend - WORKING
